title: CWNN
description: (CWNN)Industrial oriented lightweight integration package, you can experience various industrial modules
body:
## **Welcome to download**

![NONEWM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2286942f3e9ed4251f7134d2b2a4f55637996f04.jpeg)

(**_CNNW_**)Industrial oriented lightweight integration package,you can experience various industrial modules

**Built on NeoForge create**  
uses the NeoForge mod loader, fast, and supports a lot of mods.

**_It's open source_** (CNNW)developers to create a better user experience for everyone.

## **[在爱发电上发电](https://afdian.com/a/wmxiunonenone)**
